Assets

Assets

Private-by-default storage for personal, workspace, project and showcase assets.

Upload assetAsk CORE

Asset privacy zones

My AssetsPrivate to the individual user unless shared.
Private
Workspace AssetsShared with people allowed inside that company hub.
Workspace
Project AssetsVisible only to assigned project members.
Project
Showcase AssetsSelected files made public by the owner.
Opt-in

Asset actions

UploadTagVersionApproveAttach to taskMove to projectPublish to showcase

Nothing is public unless the owner deliberately publishes it to a showcase.
